findings.title: Persistence boundary result omits persistence_store_write_permitted attestation
findings.description: S12 exposed persistence_record_write_permitted=false but lacked a sibling persistence_store_write_permitted=false result attestation even though policy and scope already rejected write_persistence_store claims.
findings.recommendation: Add persistence_store_write_permitted=false to the S12 result fields, precheck result, validator, fixture, and tests.

findings.title: Persistence boundary result omits persistence_store_write_permitted attestation
findings.resolution: Added persistence_store_write_permitted=false to CONTROL_PLANE_PERMISSION_AUDIT_BINDING_PERSISTENCE_BOUNDARY_RESULT_FIELDS, the S12 precheck result object, result validator false-field enforcement, service tests, fixture precheck_result, and contract result_fields; also added persistence_store_write_claim to failClosedOn for parity.

adjudication_notes: One completed claude-opus-4-8 max read-only/no-tools review is recorded for CP00-008.
Claude returned PASS_WITH_FINDINGS with zero P0, zero P1, and one P2 finding.
The P2 attestation-symmetry finding was fixed before pack closeout.
No unresolved findings remain after adjudication.
